title: Israel says Iran war entering 'decisive phase'
summary_full: Middle East cities witnessed intense explosions as Israel declared its conflict with Iran entering a "decisive phase." Strikes targeted the American embassy in Baghdad and a major Emirati energy facility. Lebanon's health ministry reported 826 deaths from Israeli strikes, including children and paramedics, amid escalating regional tensions.
